hero.eyebrow: A little Holland in the heart of the Carpathians
hero.title: AmstelSki
hero.subtitle: A Bukovel hotel near lifts 2 and 5, with restaurant De Molen, convenient ski storage, and the kind of thoughtful service guests remember.

booking.title: Booking
booking.successText: We will contact you to confirm the booking and clarify your arrival details.
booking.name: Name

sections.roomsCopy: From standard rooms to more spacious formats for families, each category is designed for comfort after an active day in the mountains.
sections.servicesCopy: A personal electronic key, gear storage, 24/7 service, and restaurant De Molen are among the reasons guests choose AmstelSki.
sections.mapCopy: Lifts, dining, and the key points around the hotel, all arranged for an easy stay in Bukovel.
sections.galleryCopy: Dutch-inspired architecture, cozy interiors, and the atmosphere of a hotel guests want to return to.

concierge.label: AI concierge
concierge.intro: Hello. I can help with room selection, dinner at De Molen, late arrival, or planning the most comfortable stay.

suggestions.experiences: What can I do at night?

seo.defaultTitle: AmstelSki | Luxury Boutique Hotel in Bukovel
seo.defaultDescription: AmstelSki is a little Holland in the heart of the Carpathians, with comfortable rooms, restaurant De Molen, ski storage, and a location near lifts 2 and 5.
